negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
16. ? [X0] : (professional_wrestling_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feud(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
17. ~? [X0] : (professional_wrestling_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & feud(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 16]
19. ! [X0] : (~professional_wrestling_stable(X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~feud(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 17]
20. professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 1]
22. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
23. feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
34. ~feud(imperium,X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
35. ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) | ~professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 23,34]
36. ~professional_wrestling_stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 35,22]
37. $false [forward subsumption resolution 36,20]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
